TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: smlalu qutux qutux sr'ux na 'tayal ga kya kwara lalu ta, ana ga kya Gaga nqu smlalu, ini si hmci.kneril hiya ga siki qnzyat mqumah, tminun ru mlahang qutux ngasal, nanu yasa qu smlalu 'laqi kneril ga, mutux naha s'agal squ lalu na kk'man ini ga Wagi, Byacing ru Bengah. m_yal su nqu Wasiq, Umas, Toyu, Yabung, Sugi...kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu na kinbkesan, iyan nqu Amuy, Maya, Lawa, Pisuy, Yari, Yayut, Pitay, Ciwas, Yasil, Yagu, Rimuy, Yuma, Atay, Lalum, Simuy, Sonun, Tapas, Pepay... mlikuy hiya ga siki si kint'tu mtzyuwaw, qmalup, tmbbahu, rranga nya qutux nya ngasal, nanu yasa qu mutux naha sllwan nqu lalu na qqhuniq. iyan nqu Bsyal, Pihaw, Hayung, Boxi, Baysu, Qaysu, Yumin...kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu na kinbkesan, iyan nqu Bawnay, Watan, Yukih, Syat, Walis, Behuy, Yukan, Tlaw, Yupas, Iban, Piling, Kagi...
S.PHON: s~ɕmlalu qutux qutux s~ɕrʔux na ʔtajal ɣa kja kwara lalu ta, ana ɣa kja ɣaɣa nqu s~ɕmlalu, ini s~ɕi ħmʦ~ʨi.kneril ħija ɣa s~ɕiki qnzjat mqumaħ, tminun ru mlaħaŋ qutux ŋas~ɕal, nanu jas~ɕa qu s~ɕmlalu ʔlaqi kneril ɣa, mutux naħa s~ɕʔaɣal s~ɕqu lalu na kkʔman ini ɣa waɣi, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru βeŋaħ. məjal s~ɕu nqu was~ɕiq, umas~ɕ, toju, jaβuŋ, s~ɕuɣi...kja uzi qu ʔnaɣal naħa s~ɕqu lalu na kinβkes~ɕan, ijan nqu amuj, maja, lawa, pis~ɕuj, jari, jajut, pitaj, ʦ~ʨiwas~ɕ, jas~ɕil, jaɣu, rimuj, juma, ataj, lalum, s~ɕimuj, s~ɕonun, tapas~ɕ, pepaj... mlikuj ħija ɣa s~ɕiki s~ɕi kintʔtu mtzjuwaw, qmalup, tmββaħu, rraŋa nja qutux nja ŋas~ɕal, nanu jas~ɕa qu mutux naħa s~ɕllwan nqu lalu na qqħuniq. ijan nqu βs~ɕjal, piħaw, ħajuŋ, βoxi, βajs~ɕu, qajs~ɕu, jumin...kja uzi qu ʔnaɣal naħa s~ɕqu lalu na kinβkes~ɕan, ijan nqu βawnaj, watan, jukiħ, s~ɕjat, walis~ɕ, βeħuj, jukan, tlaw, jupas~ɕ, iβan, piliŋ, kaɣi...
S.FORM: smlalu qutux qutux sr'ux na 'tayal ga kya kwara lalu ta, ana ga kya Gaga nqu smlalu, ini si hmci.kneril hiya ga siki qnzyat mqumah, tminun ru mlahang qutux ngasal, nanu yasa qu smlalu 'laqi kneril ga, mutux naha s'agal squ lalu na kk'man ini ga Wagi, Byacing ru Bengah. m_yal su nqu Wasiq, Umas, Toyu, Yabung, Sugi...kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu na kinbkesan, iyan nqu Amuy, Maya, Lawa, Pisuy, Yari, Yayut, Pitay, Ciwas, Yasil, Yagu, Rimuy, Yuma, Atay, Lalum, Simuy, Sonun, Tapas, Pepay... mlikuy hiya ga siki si kint'tu mtzyuwaw, qmalup, tmbbahu, rranga nya qutux nya ngasal, nanu yasa qu mutux naha sllwan nqu lalu na qqhuniq. iyan nqu Bsyal, Pihaw, Hayung, Boxi, Baysu, Qaysu, Yumin...kya uzi qu 'nagal naha squ lalu na kinbkesan, iyan nqu Bawnay, Watan, Yukih, Syat, Walis, Behuy, Yukan, Tlaw, Yupas, Iban, Piling, Kagi...
S.PHON: s~ɕmlalu qutux qutux s~ɕrʔux na ʔtajal ɣa kja kwara lalu ta, ana ɣa kja ɣaɣa nqu s~ɕmlalu, ini s~ɕi ħmʦ~ʨi.kneril ħija ɣa s~ɕiki qnzjat mqumaħ, tminun ru mlaħaŋ qutux ŋas~ɕal, nanu jas~ɕa qu s~ɕmlalu ʔlaqi kneril ɣa, mutux naħa s~ɕʔaɣal s~ɕqu lalu na kkʔman ini ɣa waɣi, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru βeŋaħ. məjal s~ɕu nqu was~ɕiq, umas~ɕ, toju, jaβuŋ, s~ɕuɣi...kja uzi qu ʔnaɣal naħa s~ɕqu lalu na kinβkes~ɕan, ijan nqu amuj, maja, lawa, pis~ɕuj, jari, jajut, pitaj, ʦ~ʨiwas~ɕ, jas~ɕil, jaɣu, rimuj, juma, ataj, lalum, s~ɕimuj, s~ɕonun, tapas~ɕ, pepaj... mlikuj ħija ɣa s~ɕiki s~ɕi kintʔtu mtzjuwaw, qmalup, tmββaħu, rraŋa nja qutux nja ŋas~ɕal, nanu jas~ɕa qu mutux naħa s~ɕllwan nqu lalu na qqħuniq. ijan nqu βs~ɕjal, piħaw, ħajuŋ, βoxi, βajs~ɕu, qajs~ɕu, jumin...kja uzi qu ʔnaɣal naħa s~ɕqu lalu na kinβkes~ɕan, ijan nqu βawnaj, watan, jukiħ, s~ɕjat, walis~ɕ, βeħuj, jukan, tlaw, jupas~ɕ, iβan, piliŋ, kaɣi...
